metadata.title: PromptFlow - AI Prompt Library | Manage Your ChatGPT, Claude & DeepSeek Prompts
metadata.description: PromptFlow is your personal AI prompt library. Press ⌘K to instantly access saved prompts in ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek, Kimi and more. Supports template variables, folder management, and community sharing.

home.badge: Supports ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek & 10+ AI Platforms
home.title: Your AI Prompt Library, One Keystroke Away
home.description: Save and manage your best ChatGPT prompts, Midjourney commands, and Claude system prompts. Press ⌘K on any AI page to instantly access what you need.

features.title: Powerful Yet Simple
features.subtitle: Designed to boost your AI productivity

saveInstantly.title: One-Click Access to ChatGPT Prompts
saveInstantly.description: Press ⌘K on ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek or any AI page. Select from your personal prompt library and auto-copy to clipboard.

insertOneClick.title: Smart Organization
insertOneClick.description: Create folders, add tags, and manage hundreds of prompts with ease. Supports journaling, writing, coding, art and more.

organize.title: Community Curated Templates
organize.description: Discover and save the best prompts shared by the community. One-click sync to your personal prompt library.

share.title: Template Variables
share.description: Create prompts with variables like '{'topic'}' '{'style'}'. Auto-fill on use. One template for endless scenarios.

step1.title: Save Your First Prompt
step1.description: Paste or type your prompt in the options page. Add tags and categories. Supports plain text or templates with variables.

step2.title: Access on AI Pages
step2.description: Go to ChatGPT, Claude, or other AI sites. Press ⌘K in the input box. Select your prompt, it's automatically copied.

step3.title: Paste and Send
step3.description: Press ⌘V to paste in the AI input box. Send directly or edit as needed. All prompts stored locally for privacy.

cta.title: Ready to Boost Your AI Workflow?
cta.subtitle: Install PromptFlow for free. Make every AI conversation more efficient. Supports Chrome, Firefox, and other major browsers.

prompts.title: Discover AI Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Explore the best ChatGPT prompts, AI art commands, and writing inspirations shared by the community.

blog.title: The PromptFlow Blog
blog.subtitle: Prompt engineering tips, AI tool tutorials, and PromptFlow updates.

footer.description: PromptFlow is your personal AI prompt library. Access saved prompts instantly in ChatGPT, Claude, DeepSeek and more.
